items.question: Do I need to book an appointment before visiting?
items.answer: Walk-ins are welcome, but booking online in advance helps us reduce your waiting time.

items.question: How do I get my test report?
items.answer: Once your report is ready, open Track / Reports, enter your mobile number, verify the SMS code, and download from your visit history. We'll also notify you by SMS.

items.question: Is home sample collection available everywhere in the city?
items.answer: We currently cover most areas within the city. Please mention your address while booking and our team will confirm availability.

items.question: How long does it take to get results?
items.answer: Most routine tests are ready within 24 hours. Specialized tests may take longer — the expected turnaround time is shown next to each test.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: You can pay in cash at the center or during home collection. Online payment shows a demo checkout (bKash / Nagad / card UI) until a live gateway is connected — no real charge in demo mode.

items.question: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
items.answer: Yes. Open Track / Reports with your mobile number and the SMS code. While a booking is still pending or confirmed, you can cancel or pick a new date and time slot.

booking.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll confirm your booking by SMS
booking.phoneHelp: Use your Bangladeshi mobile number, e.g. 01XXXXXXXXX

booking.payOnlineHelp: Pay securely after booking. Demo mode shows a sample checkout (no real charge).
booking.payAtCenter: Amount due at center or collection
booking.successHelp: Save this code for your records (staff may ask for it). To track status or download reports later, just open Track with your mobile number — no need to remember the code.
booking.nextStepSms: Save the SMS confirmation on your phone.
booking.nextStepVisit: Come at your preferred slot (or wait for home collection).
booking.nextStepTrack: Track anytime with your phone number + OTP and download reports when ready.
booking.paymentPendingOnline: Online payment pending — complete checkout below or later from Track.

booking.errorPhoneInvalid: Please enter a valid mobile number (at least 10 digits).
booking.errorSlotFull: That time slot is full for the selected date. Please choose another.
booking.generic: Something went wrong. Please check your details and try again.

track.title: Patient Portal
track.subtitle: Enter the mobile number you used while booking — we'll text you a one-time code
track.phoneOnlyHelp: No reference code needed. We'll find every booking linked to this number.
track.otpHelp: Enter the 6-digit code we just sent by SMS
track.otpDevBypassHelp: Dev mode: any OTP works (set DEV_OTP_BYPASS=false to enforce real codes). Real SMS OTP matching is already implemented for production.

track.smsSentSuccess: Status SMS sent to your phone.
track.paymentCash: Pay in cash at the center or during collection
track.reportPending: Your report is not ready yet. We'll notify you by SMS as soon as it's available.
track.rescheduledSuccess: Your preferred slot was updated. We'll confirm shortly.

track.errorOtpExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.

track.errorOtpCooldown: Please wait a few seconds before requesting another code.

track.errorPastDate: The new date cannot be in the past.
track.errorSlotFull: That time slot is full for the selected date. Please choose another.
